## Checklist

- [ ] `dart format --output=none --set-exit-if-changed lib test` passes
- [ ] `flutter analyze` reports no issues
- [ ] `flutter test` passes
- [ ] Tests cover the new behavior
- [ ] If this completes a roadmap task, it's checked off in `Roadmap.md`
- [ ] No Flutter imports added under `lib/domain/` or `lib/format/`
- [ ] Document mutations go through a command object
- [ ] If the `.skd` format changed: a round-trip test exists and golden fixtures still load
